channel.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - project
channel.description: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

item.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • 78a6ba6 fix: write pipeline.log to EV_results/ (output_dir) instead of EV_analysis/ (lau
  • 09b295c fix: meta.json path in git sync; remove JS sidecar references in comments
  • 5d9922d Enhance Nextflow pipeline with improved logging and HTML serving
  • 64610e9 Add interactive plotter and HTML server for EmotiView archives
  • 5847b6e Refactor and enhance data processing scripts

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →
